title: Unexpected results when assigning string literals with escapes to string variables

features.name: string_assignment_with_null_escape
features.description: Code should include a string variable assigned a string literal containing \0 escape sequence

features.name: string_assignment_with_octal_escape_sequence
features.description: Code should include a string variable assigned a string literal containing multi-digit octal escape sequences like \015 or \012

features.name: string_concatenation_with_escaped_string_literals
features.description: Code should include a string variable assigned via concatenation where one element is a string literal with embedded octal escapes
